message:
feat(harness): E2E demo.yaml execution and claim verification (bd-2xj.10)

CI test that loads demo.yaml and exercises all 5 demos end-to-end:
- Renders all 12+ widget types from widget gallery demo
- Validates 4 disclosure levels in decision card demo
- Verifies resize-based diff strategy evaluation
- Confirms deterministic replay produces identical BLAKE3 checksums
- Asserts demo.run tracing span emission
- Checks all demos complete within their timeout budgets

11 E2E tests covering execution, content, checksums, timing, and tracing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
